rationale: The cited paper is referenced only briefly to justify how carryover parameters are interpreted in the state-space setup (i.e., values between 0 and 1 indicating persistence). The citing article does not build its core theory, hypotheses, or empirical contribution around Ataman et al. (2010), nor does it directly extend or test that paper's substantive findings. This functions as a methodological background citation rather than a central intellectual dependency.
